phase_2.correlations: Correlation analysis reveals moderate compatibility between positional, kinetic, and acoustic factors.
phase_2.holistic_assessment: Moderate focus conditions evident: audio levels at 77.4 dB, stable user state. Session duration (243s) limits comprehensive concentration evaluation.

phase_3.recommendations: Use active noise cancellation or white noise to counteract loud surroundings. Moderate session length adequate; potential to extend to 364s for skill building.
